channel.title: Scrypt on My Awesome Site
channel.description: Recent content in Scrypt on My Awesome Site

item.title: Gocryptfs: A File-based Encryption Tool Written in Go
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: Have you ever dreamt of a (terminal) tool that is able to encrypt your regular file (and directories) in a convenient way? Gocryptfs is your answer. It is a terminal-based, powerful, and open source encryption tool.
